heading: About the Student Affairs Office

lead.value: The Student Affairs Office (SAO) is the central point of support for student life at IIT Patna — bringing hostels, the Students' Gymkhana, wellness, career counselling, and welfare services under one calm, easy-to-navigate front door.

body.value: From the day a student arrives on the Bihta campus to the day they graduate, the SAO works to make every part of campus life clear, accessible, and supportive. We coordinate residential life, co-curricular activity, health and wellness, financial assistance, and grievance redressal.
Today over 1,500 students live on campus across the institute's boys' and girls' hostels, with reading rooms, indoor games, gymnasiums, dining halls and 24-hour Wi-Fi.
Rather than scattering information across many offices and portals, the SAO gives students a single place to find what they need and who to ask.

_note: history blurb is dummy; institute facts (residents, hostels, fests) are real.
